steps.title: Match the traffic claim
steps.content: The student's claim has two parts: smaller areas may have had less congestion than very large cities, but their congestion still worsened over time. The supporting graph description must show both lower delay and rising delay.

steps.title: Reject incomplete data
steps.content: Choice B mentions a value below 20 hours in at least one area but does not show both parts of the claim. Choice C gives only one 1992 value for New York City. Choice D reverses the comparison by saying Beaumont had greater delay than New York City. The answer is A.
